title: General Recreational Activities/Sports - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Youth Services > General Recreational Activities/Sports 100 Matching Service Providers ADVENTURES WITHOUT LIMITS ADVENTURE TRIPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides outdoor programs for children and adults with all ability levels. Programs include hiking, kayaking, canoeing, rafting, paddleboarding cross-country skiing, snowshoeing, rock climbing, and camping. Offers partner programs and open enrollment trips for those with little or no experience. PO Box #670 Forest Grove, OR 97116 Eligibility: Age 6 and older Hours: Office hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm. Services run 7 days per week. Email (503) 359-2568 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ARC UMATILLA COUNTY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides connections to resources such as case management services, assistance with advocacy, disability awareness training, education, recreational programs, and vocational training. 215 W Orchard Avenue Hermiston, OR 978381738 Eligibility: Individuals who have intellectual and developmental disabilities and their families Hours: Monday 9am-noon Email (541) 567-7615 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ASHLAND FAMILY YMCA COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a variety of recreation opportunities: aquatic center, gym and group exercise classes, youth and adult sports. Preschool and afterschool programs also provided. 540 YMCA Way Ashland, OR 97520 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Facility: Monday-Friday 5am-9pm, Saturday 8am-6pm, Sunday 8am-5pm Pool: Monday-Friday 5:30am-8:30pm, Saturday 8am-5:30pm, Sunday 9am-4:30pm Email (541) 482-9622 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BEND PARK AND RECREATION DISTRICT RECREATION DISTRICT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides various recreation opportunities, such as sports, fitness, crafts, and music, senior centers, and swimming pools. Youth programs include topics such as art, science, technology, and nature. Provides preschool, after-school care, no-school-day child care, and Kids’ Corner, parent-child activity activities are available as well. Operates and maintains developed and undeveloped parkland, including natural areas, hiking trails, and the following facilities: Bend Senior Center, Juniper Swim and Fitness Center, Larkspur Community Center, The Pavilion, and The Art Station. Also operates a variety of sports complexes, including a skate park, ice skating and roller rink, and dog off-leash areas. 799 SW Columbia Street Bend, OR 97702 Eligibility: -Unrestricted. Activities and classes are available for all ages, with special programs for young children, youth, individuals with disabilities, and older adults. -After-school care/no school child care: K-5th grade -Youth enrichment programs: Ages 3-17 Hours: Varies by activity. Visit website for the event calendar.
